title: Matera Featured on The Payments Perspective Podcast
excerpt: In this episode of the Payments Perspective podcast, Carmen Murphy speaks with Sarah Hoisington from Matera about the evolution and future of QR codes in payments.
body:
In this episode of the Payments Perspective podcast, Carmen Murphy speaks with Sarah Hoisington from Matera about the evolution and future of QR codes in payments.

They discuss the differences between payment QR codes and URL QR codes, the security features of payment QR codes, and the global adoption of QR codes in various countries. The conversation also covers the standardization efforts for QR codes in the US, the flexibility and various use cases of payment QR codes, and the future outlook for QR codes in the US payment landscape.
